heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Scattered showers.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s north, mid 60s to around 70 south

heading: Thursday Night
text: A stray evening shower, partial clearing, except clouds, a few showers northeast.

heading: Friday
text: Morning clearing. Clouds spreading south, with showers north in the afternoon.

heading: Saturday
text: Early showers ending. Some afternoon clearing.
